description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a spacious courtyard at its center, surrounded by multiple interconnected rectangular structures. The exterior is predominantly white with large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The courtyard features a tiled patio, several trees, and landscaped greenery, with a swimming pool and lounge area on one side. There is a driveway with parked cars, a garage, and a wooden deck with outdoor seating and a dining area. The house includes multiple stories, with rooftop terraces and balconies visible from several angles. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a central courtyard, flat roofs, large windows, and extensive outdoor living areas. The design features white facades, landscaped gardens, and a mix of patios, decks, and a swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main courtyard, driveway with cars, garage, and central patio with trees and seating.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden deck, outdoor dining area, and the transition between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, lounge area, and rooftop terraces, with clear sightlines into the house's interior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, additional parking, and the arrangement of balconies and terraces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, modern door with minimal steps, integrated into a flat facade, and flanked by large windows and landscaped elements.
